news.title: Google releases three new Gemini models — but no 3.5 Pro
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Google released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Flash Cyber, but the continued absence of Gemini 3.5 Pro raises fresh questions about its AI strategy.

news.description: [AI-NEWS] Google has released Gemini 3.6 Flash and 3.5 Flash-Lite as new workhorses designed to cut latency and token costs for enterprise AI agents. The economics of running autonomous software agents inside a production environment come down to a fixed...

news.title: US threatens sanctions against Chinese AI models over IP theft
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. could sanction Chinese open AI models over alleged IP theft, expanding the Trump administration's campaign to slow China's AI advances.

news.title: Music streamer Deezer says more than 50% of daily uploads are AI-generated
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Deezer said more than 90,000 AI-generated tracks were uploaded daily on the platform in June.

news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Gritt is coming out of stealth with $34 million and plans to automate the hardest tasks on construction sites.

news.title: Asian shares mostly gain, as South Korea's Kospi jumps 4.7%
news.description: [THE ASSOCIATED PRESS] Asian shares have mostly gained, with markets in South Korea and Japan trading higher after recent declines due to heavy selling of stocks linked to artificial intelligence.

news.title: China's new AI model halts new subscriptions as demand swamps capacity
news.description: [THE STAR] The new, powerful Chinese artificial intelligence model Kimi K3, which has caused a stir in the US tech industry, has suspended new subscriptions after a flood in demand overwhelmed capacity within days of the launch.

news.title: Nifty 50, Sensex Outlook: How Will Indian Stock Market Trade On July 21?
news.description: [REPUBLIC WORLD] The Indian stock market benchmark bourses, Sensex, and Nifty 50, are expected to open slightly lower even when there are positive cues from Asian markets, which rose in early trade as artificial-intelligence led sell-off lost steam.
